commit.subject: LU-18162 obdclass: remove do_lcfg() and class_attach()
commit.message:
LU-18162 obdclass: remove do_lcfg() and class_attach()

... and just call functions like normal rather than passing
around binary lcfg logs.

Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I698a70a48d805b560693af5d3776559af796b50f
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64341
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
